conversation_summary:
The user is building a wardrobe management application. The focus has been on refining the user experience, particularly for mobile devices. Key changes include making the search and filter options in the Wardrobe page more mobile-friendly by converting them to icons that open a sheet, and dynamically displaying the user's name in the page title instead of a generic "My Wardrobe."

The dashboard has also seen significant updates for mobile. It now features an interactive, infinite-scrolling feed similar to platforms like Instagram and Pinterest, displaying a mix of wardrobe items, trends, and outfits. A crucial refinement was to filter out trends that do not have associated images. Additionally, the weather feature, initially presented as a button, has been made more subtle with just text and location, and is now designed to rotate through conditions including the day's highest and lowest temperatures on mobile.
